ddls:
CREATE TABLE "biological_sequences" (
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the sequence */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the DNA sequence */,
  "alphabet" TEXT /* Alphabet used (e.g., DNA) */,
  "seq" TEXT /* The actual DNA sequence */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the DNA sequence */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the DNA sequence */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the sequence */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the sequence was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the sequence */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the sequence was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the sequence is public or private */,
  "annotations" TEXT /* Additional annotations or notes about the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bioentry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biological entry this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sequence */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who made the changes */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* The date the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_bioentry_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioentry_id") REFERENCES biological_sequences ("bioentry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the biological entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the biological entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_bioentry_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioentry_id") REFERENCES biological_sequences ("bioentry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search */,
  "query" TEXT /* The search query executed */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was made */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* The number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the search query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biological entry involved in the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_bioentry_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioentry_id") REFERENCES biological_sequences ("bioentry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_logs" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological entry being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the analysis */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the analysis results */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_logs_bioentry_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioentry_id") REFERENCES biological_sequences ("bioentry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing record */,
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological entry being shared */,
  "user_id_from" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the data */,
  "user_id_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the data */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the data sharing (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "shared_data_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the shared data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_bioentry_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioentry_id") REFERENCES biological_sequences ("bioentry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_from") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "bioentry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the biological entry related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Feedback text provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the feedback is public or private */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* A rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_bioentry_id FOREIGN KEY ("bioentry_id") REFERENCES biological_sequences ("bioentry_id")
)
